title: Systemutvecklare
description:
**Välkommen till Custodia Consulting - Upptäck möjligheterna att växa med oss!**
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Vi söker nu drivna Systemutvecklare för spännande uppdrag hos våra kunder. Hos Custodia strävar vi efter att bygga konkurrenskraftiga och kompetenta team med stark integritet inom automotive, life science, försvarsindustri och IT.


Vi söker dig som vill arbeta i tekniskt utmanande miljöer där du får vara med och utveckla robusta och moderna system tillsammans med erfarna team.




**Om tjänsten**
---------------


Som Custodia-konsult arbetar du med utveckling, vidareutveckling och förvaltning av verksamhetskritiska system hos våra kunder. Uppdragen varierar beroende på verksamhet och teknisk miljö, men gemensamt är att du får arbeta nära både teknik och verksamhet för att skapa hållbara lösningar.


Du kommer att arbeta i team där samarbete, initiativförmåga och teknisk nyfikenhet värderas högt. Rollen passar dig som gillar att ta ansvar, bidra med idéer och vara med och utveckla både system och arbetssätt.


Vissa av våra uppdrag sker inom säkerhetsklassade verksamheter, vilket kan innebära krav på svenskt medborgarskap och godkänd säkerhetsprövning.




**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

* Utveckla och vidareutveckla system och applikationer inom backend och fullstack
* Arbeta med Kotlin, Java, Spring Boot och Spring Framework i moderna utvecklingsmiljöer
* Delta i design, implementation och förbättring av tekniska lösningar
* Arbeta med integrationer, databaser och API:er
* Bidra till förbättringsarbete inom utvecklingsprocesser, drift och automation
* Samarbeta nära utvecklare, arkitekter och verksamhet i agila team


Du kommer även att vara en del utav Custodia teamet där du kommer att ha en direkt inverkan på besluttagandet, utformningen av företagskulturen samt etableringen av värdegrunden både internt och externt.




**Vi söker dig som**
--------------------

* Har relevant högskoleutbildning inom systemutveckling, datateknik eller motsvarande
* Har minst 5 års erfarenhet av systemutveckling inom relevant område
* Har god erfarenhet av Kotlin (JVM) och/eller Java
* Har god erfarenhet av Spring Boot / Spring Framework
* Kan arbeta på plats
* Är flytande i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift
* Är självgående och trivs med att ta ansvar i teammiljöer

##### **Det är meriterande om du har**

* Erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt
* Erfarenhet av DevOps, CI/CD, Ansible, Helm eller Hauler
* Erfarenhet av arbete i Linuxmiljö
* Erfarenhet av Typescript och React
* Erfarenhet av XML och XPath
* Erfarenhet av databaser och containerteknologier

##### **För att lyckas i rollen har du följande personliga egenskaper:**

* Problemlösande
* Kommunikativ
* Team-player
* Analytisk

**Om oss**
----------


Custodia Consulting är ett konsultföretag med stort fokus på prestation med avsikt att skapa mervärde. Vi erbjuder högkvalitativa tjänster inom Projektledning, teknik, Life Science och digitala lösningar. Vår vision är att bygga starka och konkurrenskraftiga team med människor från olika bakgrund, livs- och arbetslivserfarenhet. Genom att bygga våra team med våra värderingar tror vi starkt på att skapa värde för våra kunder, men också för våra anställda.


Vi på Custodia främjar arbetsglädje och välmående. Vi kommer därför att ha kontinuerliga avstämningar och workshops, där vi kan vara öppna och transparenta, utbyta erfarenheter och diskutera idéer.


Vi har ett stort kontaktnätverk samt täta samarbeten med större konsultbolag, vilket gör det enklare för oss att placera våra konsulter i rätt uppdrag.


Läs mer om oss här.


##### **Våra kärnvärden:**

* **Integritet** *-* Vi tar ansvar och är ett dedikerat och pålitligt team.
* **Kvalitet** *-* Vi levererar fantastiska resultat utan kompromisser.
* **Inkludering** *-* Alla är viktiga, vi skapar mångfaldiga och högpresterande team som kan skapa värde för våra kunder.

##### **Karriärsmöjligheter:**


Vår passion för tillväxt och utveckling sträcker sig inte bara till våra kunder, utan även till våra medarbetare. Som ett växande konsultbolag erbjuder vi spännande karriärmöjligheter där du kan växa och blomstra tillsammans med oss. Vi tror på att investera i våra talanger och skapa en miljö där du kan utvecklas professionellt och personligt.


Samtliga konsulter på Custodia har även en affärsmässig roll för att bidra till bolagsetableringen och tillväxten. Vi tillsammans kommer att arbeta för att sätta den önskvärda kulturen och se till att bolagets kärnvärden uppmärksammas hos våra kunder, partners och leverantörer.

**Vår rekryteringsprocess**
---------------------------


Vi tillämpar löpande urval. Första steget är en telefonintervju, där vi går igenom din bakgrund och motivation. Därefter följer en djupintervju, där vi utforskar din kompetens och erfarenhet mer ingående.


Vi strävar efter en objektiv och rättvis rekryteringsprocess och arbetar aktivt för att motverka diskriminering i enlighet med diskrimineringsgrunderna. Vår målsättning är att rekrytera på ett inkluderande och kompetensbaserat sätt, där alla kandidater bedöms utifrån sina meriter.




**Gå med oss på Custodia och skapa en framgångsrik karriär!**
-------------------------------------------------------------


Läs mer på våran hemsida.

title: Cloud Developer - Is DevEx your "product" of choice?
description:
Times are changing. Fast. And we want you to transform the Cloud space with us!


This is why we have created a whole new genre of devs who'll bring us to the next level and beyond.


We want to grow with a low-ego, collaborative and backend-focused cloud developer who acts as a force multiplier for the engineering team. The connective "spider in the web" (sorry) that makes everyone else ship faster, more safely, and more consistently. Rather than adding to a product backlog, you will build the internal tooling, shared services, and paved roads the rest of the team builds on, smooths the path from code to production, and brings engineering discipline to teams now moving fast with AI-assisted development.


Sounds like the role you've been searching for?

### **Your role:**


This is a developer-productivity role at heart. On assignment, the Cloud Developer is the person who makes a client's engineering team faster and more effective: building the internal services, libraries, and tooling the rest of the team relies on, and the paved roads that make shipping fast, safe, and repeatable. They are the connective tissue across product code, tooling, and infrastructure. Less the person shipping the next feature, more the person who makes shipping anything easier for everyone else.


The cloud is the substrate they work in; developer experience is the product. The forward-looking angle is where the need is coming from. Client engineering teams are now moving fast with AI coding tools, and that speed only pays off if the surrounding machinery keeps up, the guardrails and tooling, that let a team ship AI-assisted code safely and consistently. This role is that someone: raising the bar on how an organisation builds, now that much of the building is AI-accelerated.

### **What this role is - and is not**


What this role is:

* Building the internal services, libraries, and developer tooling — primarily in Go — that the rest of a client's engineers build on
* Smoothing the path from code to production: CI/CD, build and release tooling, and the paved roads that make shipping fast, safe, and consistent
* Reducing friction and toil across the engineering workflow — the connective work that lifts a whole team's output
* Bringing discipline to AI-accelerated development: the guardrails, patterns, harnesses, and tooling that let a team move fast with AI without shipping a mess


What this role is not:

* Not a "vanilla" product developer. This isn't about churning out business logic and enduser features; the value is in multiplying a team's output, not adding to its backlog
* Not a frontend, data-engineering, or ML/Data Science career path. This person integrates and consumes AI services, they don't build data pipelines or train models as their craft

### **Who are you?**


Your temperament matters as much as your stack and ambitions. You'll join a team with traits that are strikingly consistent: a curious, low-ego builder who takes real ownership of quality and reliability, communicates clearly, and is happiest making both the work and the people around them better.


Concretely, that means someone collaborative and unterritorial — focused on lifting the team around them rather than guarding turf — and pragmatic and outcome-oriented, bridging technical work and business goals and comfortable with product and stakeholders


Skils & Background

* 5+ years as a developer/SW engineer/programmer/cloud engineer, who enjoys building for builders
* Go (Golang) is your home turf + you have depth and feel comfortable in at least one other, modern, language like, C#, Python, Java, or Typescript
* AWS, Azure, or GCP — any one, or a combination, heck even onpremises counts
* Any infrastructure-as-code — Pulumi or Terraform are preferred
* Demonstrable interest in AI is required, hands-on experience a plus
* Managed or self-managed Kubernetes (Bonus, not a requirement)
* Fluency in Swedish and English, as most of our collaborations and client projects are conducted in Swedish


Interest in AI is a requirement for this role; hands-on AI experience is a strong plus but not a prerequisite. The bar, though, is evidenced curiosity rather than a bare claim of interest — we want someone who can actually show something.


Required: genuine, demonstrable engagement with AI tooling — a side project, real use of AI coding assistants, or a considered first-hand opinion formed from building with them.


A strong plus: hands-on experience with AI/LLM infrastructure and frameworks — AWS Bedrock / AgentCore, Vertex AI, agentic frameworks, Claude Code, and similar.

### **Let's Play!**


Applying to us is a breeze!

* Upload your resumé or use your Linkedin profile
* Answer the choice-questions (no "please-rewrite-your-resume" nonsense, promise)
* Feel free to include links to your portfolio, GitHub or similar if you have stuff you're proud of that you want to share with us

**Important notes:**

* Playground Group does *not*provide visa sponsorship or relocation support
* Applicants must already have a permanent and independent right to work in Sweden
* As part of the final stage of the recruitment process, a background check conducted by a third party will be carried out.

### **Welcome to Playground!**


At Playground, you work on real, complex assignments for well-established and ambitious clients, not bench projects or short-lived experiments. Our teams are trusted with production systems, platforms, and data that actually matter. Here growth comes from ownership, curiosity, and doing the work properly. You’re trusted to think, contribute, and keep getting better, one meaningful step at a time.


Playground brings together specialized domains under one umbrella, with a shared culture and way of working, and easy access to broad technical expertise when it helps move the work forward.


Buzz: Cloud Infra Coder, SW Engineer, Developer, Programmer, Engineer, Backend, Fullstack, GO, Golang, Java, C#, .NET, Javascript, Agentic AI, Cursor, GPT, SDK, Sverige, Sweden, Stockholm, Utvecklare, Moln

title: iOS-utvecklare till Knowit - Underkonsult
description:
**Underkonsultuppdrag med start efter sommaren. Stora möjligheter till långsiktigt uppdrag. Kund i Stockholm.**

**Vi erbjuder dig**  

Vi på Knowit arbetar med den senaste tekniken för att skapa IT-lösningar som underlättar och förbättrar vardagen för miljontals människor. Som underkonsult hos oss blir du en del av ett nordiskt power-house med fokus på innovation och hållbarhet. Vi erbjuder en bred kundkrets med många spännande och varierande uppdrag. Oavsett uppdrag har du alltid en kreativ och stöttande arbetsmiljö med fokus på personlig och professionell utveckling.  

Som konsult hos oss skapa du en bättre morgondag!

**Om rollen**


Vi vill stärka vårt mobile-team med en iOS-utvecklare som brinner för Native-appar och vill bidra till att utveckla lösningar som gör skillnad i samhället.


För att trivas och lyckas i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:

* Gedigen erfarenhet av modern iOS-utveckling. Du har arbetat inom området i minst 5 år.
* En stark känsla för tillgänglighet, användarupplevelse och kvalitetssäkring – särskilt eftersom vi arbetar med samhällskritiska appar.
* En vilja att dela kunskap och samarbeta för att hitta de bästa lösningarna tillsammans med teamet.


Vi söker dig som är lyhörd, kommunikativ och kan förklara komplexa lösningar på ett enkelt sätt. Du har förmågan att förstå behov och omvandla dem till tydliga mål och effektiva leveranser. Eftersom våra kunder är både svenska och internationella så behöver du kunna svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.


Låter det intressant? Hör av dig så berättar vi mer!

title: Senior HIL-utvecklare
description:
Nu letar vi efter en senior HIL-utvecklare till ESSIQ Väst! ESSIQ är arbetsgivaren som anstränger sig lite extra för att du ska må bra. Vad är medarbetarfokus för dig? På ESSIQ handlar det om att sätta medarbetaren i centrum. Genom ett lyhört ledarskap och en öppen företagskultur vill vi ge varje medarbetare möjligheten att forma sin karriär och sin vardag.

  

Till den här rollen söker vi dig som har erfarenhet av relevanta uppgifter och som är redo för nya utmaningar. Ser du fördelarna med att få variation och erfarenhet från olika kunder och branscher men att utvecklas med en och samma arbetsgivare? Som medarbetare på ESSIQ får du det bästa av två världar.

**ROLLBESKRIVNING**
  

I rollen kommer du att arbeta nära mjukvaruutvecklare, systemverifieringsteam och andra funktioner för att utveckla, underhålla och vidareutveckla HIL-miljöer och testriggar för verifiering och validering av fordonsfunktioner och mjukvara.


Du blir en viktig del i att säkerställa hög mjukvarukvalitet genom utveckling av testmetoder, automatisering och integration av nya funktioner i en tvärfunktionell och internationell miljö.


Du kommer att arbeta i utmanande och spännande projekt, antingen i våra egna utvecklingsmiljöer eller ute hos någon av våra kunder. Rollen innebär både självständigt arbete och samarbete i team. Du får stort ansvar för dina egna uppgifter och arbetar dagligen med kommunikation, problemlösning och teknisk utveckling.


Vi söker dig som har ett användarfokuserat och lösningsorienterat arbetssätt. Du är öppen, engagerad och innovativ, och trivs i miljöer där samarbete och kunskapsutbyte står i fokus.


En anställning hos ESSIQ innebär både trygghet och frihet. Vi stöttar dig utifrån dina behov och ambitioner och ser det som en självklarhet att du får vara med och forma din egen karriärväg. Hos oss har du också möjlighet att påverka ESSIQ som företag och arbetsplats.

**ARBETSUPPGIFTER**

* Utveckla och underhålla HIL-miljöer och testriggar.
* Arbeta med MIL-, SIL- och HIL-verifiering genom hela utvecklingscykeln.
* Utveckla och exekvera automatiserade testfall och testprocedurer.
* Verifiera komplexa elektriska system med avseende på funktion, prestanda och säkerhet.
* Ta fram testmetoder, testkrav och förbättra arbetssätt inom området.
* Planera, genomföra, rapportera och följa upp verifieringsaktiviteter.
* Arbeta med kontinuerlig integration (CI/CD) och automatiserade testkedjor.
* Bidra till integration och validering av fordonsmjukvara.
* Samarbeta nära utvecklings- och verifieringsteam i tvärfunktionella projekt.

**KVALIFIKATIONER**
  

Vi värdesätter både din tekniska kompetens och dina personliga egenskaper. För rollen ser vi att du har:

* Civilingenjörsexamen eller motsvarande inom elektroteknik, elektronik, mekatronik, datavetenskap eller liknande område.
* Minst fem års erfarenhet av systemverifiering samt praktisk erfarenhet av HIL-verifiering och utveckling av testriggar.
* Erfarenhet av MIL-, SIL- och HIL-testning.
* Goda kunskaper i Matlab/Simulink, Python samt C/C++.
* Erfarenhet av dSpace-verktyg såsom AutomationDesk, ConfigurationDesk och ControlDesk.
* Erfarenhet av verktyg som CANalyzer, CAPL, Jira och SystemWeaver.
* Kunskap om fordonskommunikationsprotokoll såsom CAN, LIN, FlexRay och Ethernet.
* Erfarenhet av Continuous Integration (CI/CD).
* Erfarenhet av Linux, Docker eller automatisering i Windows är meriterande.
* Erfarenhet från kommersiella fordon är ett plus.
* Flytande engelska i tal och skrift.

**Personlighet och engagemang**

* Du är **ansvarstagande** – kommer i mål, i medvind likväl som i motvind.
* Du är **social och kommunikativ** – öppen och tydlig gentemot dina kollegor, och är en produktiv problemlösare. Du är bra på att föra samtal om dig, arbetsteamet och leveransen inför en eller flera åhörare.
* Du är **lyhörd och hjälpsam** – tar in kunskap från omvärld och kollegor, och delar gärna med dig av din egen. Du är generös med tips, hjälp och stöd.

**OM TJÄNSTEN**

* Anställningsform: tillsvidareanställning på heltid.
* Lön och förmåner: Konkurrenskraftig fast eller rörlig lön. Goda utvecklingsmöjligheter och generösa förmåner. Tjänstepension, omfattande försäkringar.
* Placering: ESSIQ Väst – Göteborg med omnejd.
* Urval och intervjuer sker löpande, så skicka in din ansökan redan idag. Uppstart planeras till efter sommaren alt under hösten 2026. Observera att vi inte tar emot ansökningar via e-post.

**OM ESSIQ**  

ESSIQ är teknikkonsultbolaget där allt börjar med individen. Vi erbjuder möjligheten att forma din egen karriär, en modern lönepolitik och flexibla lösningar som passar dina mål och ambitioner.


Hos oss kan du arbeta ute hos kund, in-house eller i satellitkontor – beroende på vad som passar dig bäst. Dina intressen och drivkrafter vägleder oss, och vårt mål är att skapa den perfekta matchningen mellan individ och uppdrag.


ESSIQ är också ett socialt företag där gemenskapen är en viktig del av kulturen. Vi investerar mycket i både professionella och sociala aktiviteter och erbjuder ett brett utbud av möjligheter för nätverkande, kompetensutveckling och relationsbyggande. Vår kommunikationskultur präglas av öppenhet, kunskapsdelning och samarbete.

**KONTAKT**  

Frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta: Fredrik Persson, fredrik.persson@essiq.se

  

Vill du veta mer om ESSIQ?  

Besök http://essiq.se och följ oss på våra sociala medier!

title: .Net-utvecklare till vårt XLENTa team
description:
#### **Vill du vara med och forma morgondagens digitala verksamheter – tillsammans med oss?**


På XLENT Link hjälper vi några av Sveriges mest spännande organisationer att skapa hållbara digitala lösningar där verksamhet och IT samverkar.


Vi är ett erfaret team av specialister inom verksamhetsarkitektur och systemarkitektur. Efterfrågan på våra tjänster växer och nu vill vi bli fler.

### **Om rollen**


Vi hjälper våra kunder att förstå hur deras verksamhet fungerar idag – och hur den kan fungera ännu bättre imorgon. Genom att kartlägga processer, information och system identifierar vi utmaningar, möjligheter och framtida behov.


Tillsammans med kunden tar vi fram lösningar för verksamhet, information och teknik. Vi omsätter idéer till konkreta planer och prioriterade roadmaps som vi ofta följer och utvecklar tillsammans med kunden över flera år.


Vi arbetar i tvärfunktionella team där kunskapsdelning, samarbete och gemensamt lärande är en självklar del av vardagen.

### **Vem är du?**


Vi tror att du har några års erfarenhet av att arbeta i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och teknik. Du är analytisk, nyfiken och tycker om att förstå hur verksamheter fungerar och utvecklas.


Du har också en pedagogisk ådra och trivs med att göra komplexa frågor begripliga genom exempel, visualiseringar, modeller eller metaforer.


Du behöver inte kunna allt från början. Vi arbetar strukturerat med lärande genom samarbete, mentorskap och riktiga kunduppdrag.

### **Därför XLENT Link**


Vår erfarenhet är att de bästa lösningarna skapas när människor med olika bakgrund och perspektiv får möjlighet att bidra. Därför arbetar vi aktivt för en inkluderande kultur där fler känner att de hör hemma i konsult- och IT-branschen.


Om du söker en miljö där du kan fortsätta utvecklas under många år, samtidigt som du hjälper våra kunder att utvecklas, tror vi att du kommer att trivas hos oss.


Arbetet med Hållbara konsulter genomsyrar vår vardag. Vi tror att människor gör sitt bästa arbete när det finns balans mellan prestation, utveckling och välmående. Kanske är det därför många av oss har valt att stanna hos XLENT i över tio år.


Känner du igen dig?


Då vill vi gärna höra från dig. Skicka in din ansökan med CV och berätta lite mer om vem du är och varför du tror att vi skulle vara en bra match.

Vi kombinerar komplexa kundutmaningar med ett prestigelöst klimat där det är naturligt att ställa frågor, testa idéer och lära av varandra.


Om du söker en miljö där du kan fortsätta utvecklas under många år, samtidigt som du hjälper våra kunder att utvecklas, tror vi att du kommer att trivas hos oss.


Känner du igen dig? Då vill vi gärna höra från dig.Skicka in din ansökan med CV och berätta lite mer om vem du är och varför du tror att vi skulle vara en bra match.

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
At Hemnet, we build one of Sweden’s most widely used digital services. Every day, we help people navigate some of life’s biggest decisions, and that brings high expectations for quality, reliability, and long-term thinking.


We’re now looking for a Fullstack Developer to join our B2B & Seller Domain. This team builds products and services that help homeowners and agents make the most of their opportunities in the housing market.

**About the role**

You’ll be part of an experienced, cross-functional team working across both user-facing features and backend systems. You’ll contribute through hands-on development, technical leadership, and close collaboration with Product Managers, Designers, Analysts, and Engineers. Together, you’ll build solutions that create real value for sellers.


You’ll design, build, and maintain scalable backend services using Ruby, Node.js and Nest.js, contribute to frontend development in React, and support and evolve APIs across GraphQL and REST. You’ll also play an active role in our transition toward a more service-oriented architecture, helping break down complex problems and move monolithic systems into modular services over time.


Beyond day-to-day development, you’ll take part in technical discussions, contribute to architectural direction, support other engineers through collaboration and knowledge sharing, and help us continuously improve code quality, performance, and developer experience. We also hope you’ll contribute to a team culture where different perspectives are valued and people can grow together.

**Who we think you are**  

Our current stack includes Ruby and Node.js on the backend and Next.js on the frontend. You’ll work with Ruby in this role, but we don’t expect you to know everything from the start.


We think you’re an experienced engineer who enjoys building production-grade systems and working through complex problems together with others. You care about code quality, maintainability, and creating solutions that hold up over time.


You’re comfortable contributing to technical decisions, and you like collaborating across disciplines to build products that are useful and thoughtful. You don’t need to tick every box on day one, what matters most is that you bring solid engineering experience, a learning mindset, and a generous way of working with others.

**What you’ll do**

* Build and improve Hemnet’s products across the system.
* Take part in technical discussions and architectural decisions
* Work closely with product, design, and analytics.
* Contribute to a sustainable pace, high quality, and a great developer experience.
* You’ll use AI tools as part of your day-to-day work, for example to explore ideas, speed up implementation, improve code quality, and support learning and collaboration across the team.

**I am your new manager**  

Hi!  

My name is Tomas, and I’ll be your new manager. I’ve been at Hemnet since 2022 and am currently working as Engineering Manager in our domain called B2B & Sellers. I’m really excited to support the teams that will be working on many new and important areas for Hemnet, including building tools and products for agents to help them make more informed decisions.


My leadership style is listening, transparent, accessible, and supportive, while also challenging you to take your next step. Hopefully, we’ll learn a lot from each other and have plenty of fun as we break new ground at Hemnet. As a team, we get things done; we know when and where value can be added, and we’re clear on our priorities.


Why did I decide to join Hemnet? I was strongly drawn to the culture and atmosphere – a wonderful combination of kindness, inclusiveness, and helpfulness, paired with high ambitions and a strong drive forward. My impression is that the people and the workplace together create the perfect foundation for you to do the best work of your career.

**A Note on Inclusion**  

At Hemnet, we believe that diversity in gender, sexual orientation, ability, neurodiversity, cultural background and life experience makes us stronger. We welcome applicants of all identities and backgrounds.


If you meet many but not all of the requirements, we encourage you to apply. We value curiosity, a strong sense of purpose and the motivation to learn and grow, alongside your skills and experiences.  

  

**A Hybrid Way of Working**  

Our vibrant office in central Stockholm is the hub of our collaboration and culture, providing a lively space that fosters team spirit. We come together in the office three days a week, with two flexible remote days. To be part of our team, it’s essential to be based in or near Stockholm.

*Please note that we're unable to provide relocation assistance for this opportunity.*

title: Associate Creative Developer
description:
At Precis, we combine media, creative, data, and technology to help brands create digital experiences that perform. We are now looking for an Associate Creative Developer to join our Stockholm team and help us build high-quality HTML5 ads for digital campaigns.
   

  

 This is an early-career role for someone who enjoys the space between design, motion and code. You might come from a front-end, design, motion, or digital production background. What matters most is that you are curious, detail-oriented, and excited about turning creative ideas into polished, production-ready digital ads.
   

  

 You will work closely with designers, creative developers, media specialists, and project teams to build, adapt, QA, and deliver HTML5 ads across different formats, platforms, and clients.
   

  

 Are you curious to learn more about us? Read more about us here. For insights into what life is like at Precis and a peek at the perks of working with us, visit this page. In our Handbook, you can get a neat summary of who we are, our culture and our offices.
 **In** 
**this document** 
**, we have summarised what our recruitment process looks like. Take a look!**
**What You Will Be Doing 💼**
* Building HTML5 ads using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
* Adapting master creatives into different sizes, formats, and placements
* Creating lightweight animations and interactions using CSS, JavaScript, or animation libraries
* Preparing assets for display, programmatic, and paid social campaigns
* Optimizing file weight, performance, and loading behavior
* Testing ads across browsers, devices, and platforms
* Following technical specifications from platforms such as Google, Adform, and other ad-serving environments
* Collaborating with designers to make sure creative layouts work well in production
* Working with media and project teams to make sure final assets are delivered correctly
* Learning and using internal tools, templates, and automation workflows


**What We Are Looking For ✔️**
* A basic to good understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
* Interest in digital advertising, creative production, motion, or front-end craft
* A portfolio or examples of work, such as HTML5 ads, small websites, interactive layouts, animations, or digital design work
* Good attention to detail when working with layout, typography, spacing, timing, and visual consistency
* An understanding of responsive or multi-format design
* A structured way of working with files, versions, feedback, and deadlines
* A willingness to learn new tools, platforms, and production workflows
* Clear communication skills in English
* (Preferred) Experience with Google Web Designer, Campaign Manager 360, Google Ads, DV360, Adform, Bannerflow, Smartly, or similar platforms
* (Preferred) Basic knowledge of Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator and After Effects
* (Preferred) Experience with GSAP or other animation libraries
* (Preferred) Experience with Git or other version control workflows
* (Preferred) Experience creating digital ads, display ads, rich media, or campaign assets
* (Preferred) Basic knowledge of accessibility, performance, or browser testing


**What We Offer🌟**
*You can read our full offering in our* 
*handbook* 
*.*
* An intense learning environment where you will be able to grow and develop your skills and passions alongside some of the brightest minds in the industry.
* A culture that is built on collaboration, trust and innovation. We value having fun together - that’s why we also have regular afterworks, team events and a yearly festival.
* Transparent salary setting - you can find it below the job description on our website!
* 30 days paid leave, flexible public holidays, parental pay, a solid pension scheme and key insurance. Our different offices also offer different perks such as massage, health care contributions, free book orders, healthy snacks & great coffee, EAP programs and your choice of PC or Mac.
* A diverse environment with a high focus on inclusion and belonging. We speak 46 native languages around Precis, and our internal inclusion score is 4.5 out of 5.


 To make things as smooth as possible, please ensure your CV is in English.
   

  

**We update all candidates on their applications by email. If you don't receive an email from us, please check your spam folder.**
*We are committed to building an inclusive and fair workplace that attracts talent and advances its people, regardless of their background, experiences or perspectives. We believe that a diverse set of minds will continue to contribute to our innovative culture and our ability to reinvent ourselves constantly.*

title: Frontend Developer at AI focused Microsoft Partner
description:
**Frontend Developer Opportunity in Stockholm – AI Software Company** 




  





 I am hiring for an English speaking Frontend Developer to join a brilliant software company partnered with Microsoft working in the live streaming industry.
 



  





 With the help of their Microsoft partnership as well as a few other major tech enterprises, they have seen phenomenal success and are looking to expand their engineering team.
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 




  




* Develop and maintain modern frontend applications using JavaScript and Aurelia.
* Build and integrate APIs and RESTful services across multiple platforms.
* Collaborate closely with backend developers, DevOps, and product teams to deliver scalable solutions.
* Write clean, maintainable, and testable code following SOLID design principles.
* Contribute to improving usability, accessibility, and overall user experience.



  





**Requirements:** 




  




* 3+ years’ experience working as a Frontend Developer with strong JavaScript experience.
* Commercial experience with Aurelia is highly desirable.
* Strong understanding of APIs and REST integrations.
* Experience applying SOLID design principles in production environments.
* Good understanding of usability and user-focused development.
* Experience working in agile software development teams.



  





*This role is available for English speakers, however you must already have a visa or permanent residency, and be living in Stockholm.* 




  





**Why Join?** 




  




* Work for a Microsoft partner at the forefront of modern video production technology.
* Join a fast-growing engineering team building innovative AI-driven products.
* High technical ownership and influence on frontend architecture.
* Flexible hybrid set up with modern office.
* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Opportunity to start before July 2026.



  





**Please apply via the Easy Apply function.** 




  





**For more information, please email l.letchford@tenthrevolution.com.** 




  





**The application deadline for this position is the 10th of July 2026. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, so early applications are encouraged.**

title: Frontend Developer - AI Video Production
description:
**Frontend Developer — Stockholm** 




 Stockholm · Permanent · Hybrid (1-2 days/week in office) - English-speaking
 



  





**The company** 




 I'm working with an established Stockholm tech company (20+ years) that's built a long, solid relationship with Microsoft - and is now going to market
 *together* 
 with them on an exciting new product. It's AI-powered video production for Microsoft Teams: a tool that automatically turns a Teams meeting into a polished, professional broadcast, choosing layouts, following the speaker, adding branding and enabling advanced multi-segment productions, with manual control for high-end users too.
 



  





 The company has deep roots in broadcast and live video production (including sports), and this product is a spin-off venture that's in an early but very strong position - backed by an established business, an impressive history, and a Microsoft partnership that opens doors to major enterprise customers. It's a genuine chance to make a real impact on a product with serious momentum behind it.
 



  





**The role** 




 This is a frontend developer position building out the product platform alongside a small, tight team. The frontend team is currently two people, so you'll be a genuinely influential pair of hands - with real say in the tech and the direction things take, working closely with the dedicated UX/UI designers and the wider development team.
 



  





 It's worth knowing this is hands-on, live-production-adjacent work: occasionally things happen in real time and can go wrong, so it suits someone adaptable, driven and motivated, who'll get stuck in as part of the team when it counts.
 



  





**Technical environment** 




 Frontend ideally in Aurelia, but strong JavaScript with React or Angular is just as welcome. You'll work with APIs and REST integrations, applying SOLID principles and a good eye for usability and UI. (For the curious: the backend is .NET and Python, though this role won't touch it.)
 



  





**What we're looking for** 



* 3–10 years of frontend development experience
* Aurelia ideally, or strong JavaScript / React / Angular
* Experience with APIs and REST integrations
* A solid grasp of SOLID design principles
* Genuine usability and UI design sensibility
* Driven, motivated and adaptable, with a real team-spirit mentality



 A big plus if you have:
 


* Any experience with Microsoft Teams / Office integrations
* A background in video processing, broadcasting or streaming



  





**Why join** 



* A standout product built in partnership with Microsoft, with a path to major enterprise customers and real impact in video production
* A young, passionate venture with the backing and history of an established company behind it
* Genuine influence over the tech and team direction - and room to climb as it grows
* A flat, prestige-free culture: trust is passed down, leadership is hands-on and involved, and people stay (very low turnover, a genuinely positive environment)
* Standard Swedish benefits - insurance, healthcare, pension, wellness
* Mostly remote, with 1-2 days per week in the office



  





***Please apply using the Easy Apply function.***




  





***Application deadline is 03/07/2026, but applications will be processed on an ongoing basis so please apply ASAP if you are interested.***




  





***Any questions, please email t.collard-gentle@tenthrevolution.com***

title: Senior Software Engineer

**.** 
 NET and C#, with JavaScript, Azure and microservices across the work.

 A plus if you have deeper experience with JavaScript, Azure or microservices.

 at Legora, you will build and own the systems that power our internal operations for Customer Enablement at scale.  You’ll create mission-critical systems that increase efficiency, reduce manual work, and embed AI directly into our customer support and operational processes. Your work will have immediate, measurable impact across the company.
   

  

*This is a Stockholm-based, 5-day in-office role. We believe building together in person drives better outcomes in a fast-scaling environment.*
**What You Will Be Doing**

title: Full‑Stack Software Engineer
description:
Hos Visionera får du möjlighet att kombinera utveckling med tekniskt ledarskap. Vi söker en driven fullstackutvecklare med starkt teknikintresse som på vill växa i rollen. Här får du arbeta brett i hela teknikstacken, från frontend, backend och med infrastruktur, tillsammans med kollegor som brinner för utveckling, innovation och ständig förbättring.
 



  





**Om tjänsten** 




  





 Som fullstackutvecklare hos Visionera blir du en del av vårt DevOps-team som utvecklar och förvaltar vår egna SAAS-lösning VisionFlow - som är ett flexibelt verktyg för ITSM/ESM, CRM och ärendehantering som används av kunder i både privat och offentlig sektor. Du kommer att arbeta med Java, JavaScript, databaser, infrastruktur och plattform. Med tiden kommer du att få ta mer ansvar för teknikval, arkitektur och utveckling. För rätt person finns en tydlig karriärsväg mot en mer ledande roll där du blir central i att forma både produkt och team.
 



  





**Arbetsuppgifter** 




  




* Hands-on fullstack utveckling; mobilapp, webbklient, back-end och databas
* Vara delaktig i arbete med infrastruktur och applikationsdrift
* Delta i utveckling av nya moduler och förbättringar av produkten
* Agera bollplank till produktägare, testteam och support i tekniska frågor
* Samarbeta nära med kunder och bidra till teknisk problemlösning
* Dela ansvar för support och beredskap



  





**Vi söker dig som** 




  




* Har en civilingenjörsubildning eller motsvarande
* Har stor bredd och djup inom Javautveckling och objektorienterad JavaScript
* Kunskap inom HTML, CSS, REST, SQL och databaser som MS SQL Server eller MySQL
* Erfarenhet av Windows, Linux och Git
* Kunskap om säkerhet, arkitektur och systemdesign
* Intresse för att bygga och utveckla AI-funktioner och effektiva lösningar
* Tycker om att ha kundkontakt
* Flytande i svenska och engelska då båda språken används i arbetet



  





**Det är meriterande om du har** 




  




* Kunskap om andra programmeringsspråk, utvecklingsmiljöer, ramverk och verktyg
* Erfarenhet av AI-teknik eller användning av AI i utvecklingsprojekt
* Erfarenhet av agila metoder och/eller leda en grupp/team
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta enligt DevOps-principer, inklusive testautomatisering, CI/CD och hantering av molntjänster
* Arbetslivserfarenhet



  





**För att lyckas i rollen har du följande personliga egenskaper:** 




  




* Självgående
* Problemlösande
* Kommunikativ
* Orädd
* Flexibel



  





**Vår rekryteringsprocess** 




  




* Personlighets- och problemlösningstest (ca. 40 min)
* Telefonintervju med Academic Work (10-15 min)
* Digital evidensbaserad djupintervju med Academic Work (ca 40 min)
* Första intervju med Visionera (ca. 1 h)
* Problemlösningstest på plats hos Visionera (ca 10 min)
* Andra intervju med Visionera (ca. 1 h)
* Referenser + Beslut



  





 Denna rekryteringsprocess hanteras av Academic Work och vår kunds önskemål är att alla frågor rörande tjänsten skickas till Academic Work.

title: Software Engineer - Merchant Onboarding
description:
What we do at Qliro
   

  

 At Qliro, we deliver safe and simple payments. We are a dedicated partner to our merchants who serve their customers every day. We believe that if our merchants grow, we grow. We are a company of dedicated, friendly, and highly competent people who together have redefined what Qliro and payments can be. We are now on a journey of scaling our business both in Sweden and the Nordics.
   

  

 What your team does
   

  

 The Merchant Onboarding team is building the future of how merchants get started with our checkout solution. We’re creating a self-service onboarding tool that lets merchants and agents configure payment options automatically through a user-friendly, intuitive UI. Our goal is to remove friction and make integration fast and simple, enabling Qliro to grow to new heights! 🚀
   

  

 We work in a modern, cloud-based environment with a strong focus on product thinking, developer experience, and great UX. You’ll be joining a collaborative, international team who learn and have fun together.
   

  

**Current focus for the team:**
 ✔ Building a self-service onboarding platform for merchants and agents with C#/.NET and React
   

  

 ✔ Creating intuitive, scalable UIs for payment configuration and checkout setup
   

  

 ✔ Being one of the key factors for making Qliro grow with new merchants every day
   

  

 ✔ Close collaboration between developers, product, and design
   

  

 ✔ A dedicated day every other week to be creative, try out ideas and learn something new
   

  

**Tech stack highlights:**
 C#, .NET (10), React, TypeScript, Tailwind, REST APIs, AWS, Terraform, Git, CI/CD, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
   

  

**What we are looking for in our new team member:**
 💡 Fullstack mindset – You’re comfortable working across backend and frontend, and enjoy owning features end-to-end
   

  

 🚀 Agile & quality-focused – You have hands-on experience with agile development and solid understanding of software engineering practices
   

  

 🧪 Testing & reliability – You value automated testing and building maintainable and scalable systems
   

  

 🤝 Team player - Strong communicator and team player who wants to drive initiatives and collaborate with others both in and outside of the team.
   

  

**Extra plus if:**
 👩‍🎨 Interest in design & UX – You care about how things look and feel, and enjoy building intuitive, merchant-friendly interfaces
   

  

 ☁️ Cloud-curious – Experience with AWS, Infrastructure-as-Code, or cloud platforms is a big plus
   

  

 💰 Payments or fintech experience – Nice to have, but not required
   

  

**Does this sound like your next role? What are you waiting for – apply now!**

 orientation

title: Backend Developer - Java, Spring Boot & Microservices
description:
Please note that fluency in Swedish is required for this position.
   

  

 Om du vill arbeta som konsult och samtidigt bidra till en starkare offentlig sektor kan Public Sales på Nexer vara rätt plats för dig.
   

  

 Här får du tryggheten i en stabil anställning och friheten att utvecklas genom uppdrag som gör skillnad, både för dig och för samhället. På Nexer ser vi varje uppdrag som en chans att växa. Som konsult hos oss får du möjlighet att bredda din kompetens inom olika tekniker och branscher, samtidigt som du har en trygg bas. Vi tror på långsiktighet och lägger stor vikt vid både kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och en hållbar balans mellan arbete och privatliv.
   

  

**Om dig**
 Vi tror att du är en person som trivs i komplexa miljöer där arkitektur, teknik och verksamhetsbehov möts. Du är trygg i din kompetens, van att ta ansvar och har en naturlig förmåga att skapa riktning i både team och uppdrag. Du är lyhörd för andras idéer men räds inte för att bidra med egna perspektiv och initiativ. Du kan kommunicera tydligt när det behövs och du vill vara en del av ett lag som arbetar mot gemensamma mål.
   

  

 För att stärka vårt team ytterligare söker vi nu en senior Javautvecklare. Vi söker dig som tycker om att vara nära koden. Du är trygg i att översätta verksamhetsbehov till hållbara tekniska lösningar och du uppskattar att arbeta i uppdrag där modernisering, integrationer och säkerhet är centrala delar. Våra uppdrag kräver att du har svenskt medborgarskap samt kan vara på plats i Stockholm.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Minst nio års erfarenhet av Javautveckling med tillhörande relevanta verktyg
* Erfarenhet av Spring Boot
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD
* Erfarenhet av agila metoder såsom Scrum eller SAFe
* Erfarenhet av något modernt frontendramverk såsom Angular, React eller Vue
* Mycket god förmåga att kommunicera på svenska i både tal och skrift


**Det är meriterande om du har:**
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar såsom AWS eller Google Cloud
* Erfarenhet av utveckling på Openshift eller annan Kubernetes-baserad plattform
* Erfarenhet av offentlig verksamhet


**Vilka är vi på Public Sales?**
*Affärsområdet Public Sales på Nexer har länge arbetat med att driva och utveckla våra uppdrag inom offentlig sektor, myndigheter, regioner och kommuner. Nu tar vi nästa steg och skapar en ännu starkare plattform och närvaro i Mälardalsregionen. Hos oss får du inte bara arbeta med samhällsviktiga uppdrag, du får också vara med och påverka, forma kulturen och bygga upp något tillsammans med oss.*
**Ansökan**
 Du är varmt välkommen att söka tjänsten genom att skicka in din ansökan här nedan. Enligt GDPR hanterar vi inte ansökningar via e post, men har du frågor om tjänsten eller Nexer är du välkommen att höra av dig till ansvarig rekryterare, Natalie Svensson: Natalie.Svensson@nexergroup.com
   

  

 Vi tar emot ansökningar löpande så vänta inte med att söka!
   

  

 Läs mer om Nexer här:
   

  

 www.nexergroup.com

title: Senior Backend Engineer - Grafana Backend Services | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs, the company behind the open observability cloud, is founded on the principles of open source, open standards, open ecosystems, and open culture. Grafana Cloud, our fully managed observability platform, is flexible and built for scale. With Grafana Cloud's actually useful AI, organizations can see, understand, and act on all their disparate data to move at the speed of their ambitions. Today, more than 35 million users and 7,000+ customers – including Anthropic, Bloomberg, NVIDIA, Microsoft, and Salesforce – trust Grafana Labs to ensure reliability of their applications and systems, resolve incidents quickly, and optimize their telemetry to reduce noise and cost. We are a 100% remote company with 1,600+ team members across 40+ countries, and we’re backed by leading investors including Lightspeed Venture Partners, Sequoia Capital, GIC, Coatue, J.P. Morgan, CapitalG, and Lead Edge Capital. Learn more at grafana.com and follow us on LinkedIn and X.
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

**Senior Backend Engineer, Grafana Backend Services**
**This role is available for candidates located in the UK, Germany, Spain, Ireland and Sweden.**
 We are looking for a Staff Backend Engineer to join our Grafana Backend Services squad.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 The Grafana backend Services squad’s mission is to deliver the best Grafana service to both On-Prem and Cloud customers in a unified, end-to-end manner, from ownership of the API codebase all the way to operation of its components. Today, this means taking charge of multiple components such as the Grafana Backend API itself and the CLI tool, but also all the orchestration infrastructure required to deliver Grafana at the scale of our Cloud product.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Work with your team to deliver new functionality, then use the results to iterate and improve
* Contributing to and reviewing design documents for upcoming features
* Embrace our open-source culture and contribute to other projects that may not directly fall within your team’s scope
* Take an active role in influencing our roadmap and your career objectives
* Be a part of your team’s on-call rotations and take ownership of the services you’re running
* Mentor and support other team members, participate in design discussions, and collaborate with the team
* Regularly sharing ideas and knowledge across a vast array of technical ideologies and mindsets
* Working closely with the other squads in the Grafana Division


 We invest heavily in developer productivity. You can use modern AI coding assistants as part of your daily workflow (your choice of tools, within security guidelines), backed by a company-funded usage budget so you can iterate quickly without unnecessary friction.
   

  

 We encourage pragmatic AI-assisted development: faster prototyping, test generation, refactors, documentation, and incident follow-ups—always paired with strong code review and quality standards.
   

  

 You’ll also have access to frontier models (e.g., GPT-Codex 5/3, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3 Pro).
   

  

**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* Have solid backend development experience, ideally with Go
* Good understanding of storage solutions with an emphasis on relational databases like MySQL, SQLite, and Postgres
* Care deeply about developer and user experience and the quality of the products that you work on
* Have experience with delivering projects from gathering requirements, and brainstorming ideas to shipping a product to the customer’s hands in a self-driven way
* Have experience writing clean, robust, and performant software that is easily maintained by others
* Have experience with mentoring junior engineers in a collaborative but asynchronous environment
* Enjoy working on complex solutions – Grafana is a highly technical solution and has avid followers who rely on it every day and care deeply about their workflows.
* Can take on complex challenges and break them down to achieve tight learning loops: to analyze, design, and build modular solutions, deliver MVPs, gather data and feedback, and then progress iteratively


**Bonus Points For**
* Experience with open-source software and/or commercial open-source companies
* Experience working with Docker and Kubernetes
* Experience with CI/CD, DevOps, or Developer Efficiency work streams
* Been a user of Grafana and Prometheus in operational roles
* Familiarity with being on-call and performing operations/SRE tasks
* Exposure to microservices architecture and distributed systems, or a desire to learn


**Compensation & Rewards**
 In Sweden, the Base compensation range for this role is SEK 775,000 - SEK 969,000. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed in the interview process. Benefits include equity, bonus (if applicable) and other benefits listed here.
   

  

* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
*Grafana Labs is an equal opportunities employer. We welcome applications from everyone regardless of race, colour, nationality, origin, caste, sex, gender reassignment identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, religion or belief, disability, veteran status, genetic information, pregnancy, maternity, marital, family or carer status, or any other characteristic which is protected by local law. We believe that equality and diversity build a strong organisation, and we work hard to ensure that is the foundation of our organisation as we grow.*
*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Cloud Architect who loves mentoring and leading? Come and play!
description:
Playground Tech
   

  

* Stockholm
* Hybrid


 Cloud Architect who loves mentoring and leading? Come and play!
   

  

 Finding a Cloud Architect who actually enjoys the human side of tech is a bit like finding a unicorn that also knows how to (and
 *wants* 
 to!) lead the herd. You need the high-level vision to design the map, as well as the willingness to pick up a compass and lead the way through the skies.
   

  

 At some companies, "Architect" is a title for someone who sits in an ivory tower and hands down diagrams from on high. That’s not us.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Cloud Architect who loves mentoring and leading someone who still gets a buzz from opening an IDE and showing the team how it's done.
   

  

 You are the vital link between big-picture business strategy and the daily "how-to." You aren't just designing the blueprint; you’re on-site with the crew, translating complex business needs into actionable features and sprints.
   

  

**The 75/25 Split (Give or Take)**
 We believe the best leaders are those who stay sharp. You can expect a minimum of 50% hands-on engineering work. Not because you "need" to, beacause you actually want to.
   

  

* The Easy Days: You’re building, deploying, and mentoring.
* The "Consultancy" Days: Some clients need a bit more hand-holding. When the going gets tough, you might shift to a 50/50 split, balancing deep-dive engineering with stakeholder coordination and expectation management.


 What you'll do
   

  

* Driving the Ship: This isn't an administrative role. You are a Team Lead in every sense; guiding project delivery from concept to "it's alive!"
* Translating "Tech" to "Human": You’ll be chatting with Directors and Engineering Managers one hour, and pair-programming with a dev the next. You need to speak both languages fluently
* Managing the Vibe: You know how to manage people and expectations in a clear, friendly and inclusve manner. We value autonomy, proactivity, and, most importantly, being someone people actually enjoy working with


 Who are you?
   

  

 Tech has probably been a vital form of interest in your life, and you might have started out tinkering with games, or solving problems by creating technical solutions, or maybe just had that mind-set sayin "I want to to know how and why it works!".
   

  

 You might have started of your career in sw development, system engineering or as DevOps and somewhere along the way you also learned that you have an interest in leading/mentoring people.
   

  

**You Would Probably Describe Yourself As**
**Technically Senior:** 
 You’ve been around the cloud block. You have the seniority to back up your decisions and the competence to earn the team's respect
   

  

**Project-Driven:** 
 You’ve got a track record of driving projects across the finish line, not just riding in the passenger seat
   

  

**A Proactive Type:** 
 You don’t wait for a ticket to tell you something is broken. You see a gap, you fill it
   

  

**Tech Skills**
* Architectural-level competence required in at least one of the three hyperscalers: AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform
* Infrastructure as Code
* CI/CD experience with automated code deployment
* Container orchestration
* Observability tools
* Configuration management


**Bonus**
 Development experience in languages like Go or Python is beneficial for understanding developer experience, automation, and infrastructure as code
   

  

**Buzzword Bingo**
 AWS, Azure, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Terraform, Pulumi, SDK, ArgoCD, GitHub Actions, Kubernetes, Grafana, Datadog, CloudWatch, Ansible, Go, Python, Docker
   

  

 Language requirement
   

  

 Fluency in Swedish is a very-nice-to-have and English is a must. Why? Because
 *most* 
 of our collaborations and client projects are conducted in Swedish
   

  

 Let's Play!
   

  

 Applying to us is a breeze!
   

  

* Upload your resumé or use your Linkedin profile
* Answer the choice-questions (no "please-rewrite-your-resume" nonsense, promise)
* Feel free to include links to your portfolio, GitHub or similar if you have stuff you're proud of that you want to share with us


**Note**
 Playground Group does not provide visa sponsorship or relocation support.
   

  

 Applicants must already have a permanent and independent right to work in Sweden.
   

  

 Welcome to Playground!
   

  

 At Playground, you work on real, complex assignments for well-established and ambitious clients, not bench projects or short-lived experiments. Our teams are trusted with production systems, platforms, and data that actually matter. Here growth comes from ownership, curiosity, and doing the work properly. You’re trusted to think, contribute, and keep getting better, one meaningful step at a time.
   

  

 Playground brings together specialized domains under one umbrella, with a shared culture and way of working, and easy access to broad technical expertise when it helps move the work forward.
   

  

 Buzz: Product Development, PO, SRE, Site Reliability Engineer, Team Lead, Consultant, Konsult, Data Engineer, Systemutvecklare, SW Engineer, Backend Developer, DevOps, Sverige, Stockholm, Amazon Web Services, SW Architecture, Cloud Lead
   

  

 Department Playground Tech Role Tech Lead, Cloud Locations Stockholm Remote status Hybrid
   

  

 Current Job Openings

* Stockholm
* Hybrid
* Cloud Tech Lead - The lovely blend between People, Tech and Strategy Playground Tech

* Hybrid

 Stockholm
   

  

**About Playground Group**
 At Playground Group, we start, own, and grow companies — and the people who lead them. We’re a corporate group with a sharp focus on technology and leadership, built around specialized companies that together form a uniquely strong offering.
   

  

 Founded in 2008
   

  

 Co-workers 80+

title: Cloud Developer - Is DevEx your "product" of choice?
description:
Playground Tech
   

  

* Stockholm
* Hybrid


 Cloud Developer - Is DevEx your "product" of choice?
   

  

 The Playgorund Pitch
   

  

 Times are changing. Fast. And we want you to transform the Cloud space with us!
   

  

 This is why we have created a whole new genre of devs who'll bring us to the next level and beyond.
   

  

 We want to grow with a low-ego, collaborative and backend-focused cloud developer who acts as a force multiplier for the engineering team. The connective "spider in the web" (sorry) that makes everyone else ship faster, more safely, and more consistently. Rather than adding to a product backlog, you will build the internal tooling, shared services, and paved roads the rest of the team builds on, smooths the path from code to production, and brings engineering discipline to teams now moving fast with AI-assisted development.
   

  

 Sounds like the role you've been searching for?
   

  

**Your Role**
 This is a developer-productivity role at heart. On assignment, the Cloud Developer is the person who makes a client's engineering team faster and more effective: building the internal services, libraries, and tooling the rest of the team relies on, and the paved roads that make shipping fast, safe, and repeatable. They are the connective tissue across product code, tooling, and infrastructure. Less the person shipping the next feature, more the person who makes shipping anything easier for everyone else.
   

  

 The cloud is the substrate they work in; developer experience is the product. The forward-looking angle is where the need is coming from. Client engineering teams are now moving fast with AI coding tools, and that speed only pays off if the surrounding machinery keeps up, the guardrails and tooling, that let a team ship AI-assisted code safely and consistently. This role is that someone: raising the bar on how an organisation builds, now that much of the building is AI-accelerated.
   

  

 What this role is - and is not
   

  

**What This Role Is**
* Building the internal services, libraries, and developer tooling — primarily in Go — that the rest of a client's engineers build on
* Smoothing the path from code to production: CI/CD, build and release tooling, and the paved roads that make shipping fast, safe, and consistent
* Reducing friction and toil across the engineering workflow — the connective work that lifts a whole team's output
* Bringing discipline to AI-accelerated development: the guardrails, patterns, harnesses, and tooling that let a team move fast with AI without shipping a mess


**What This Role Is Not**
* Not a "vanilla" product developer. This isn't about churning out business logic and enduser features; the value is in multiplying a team's output, not adding to its backlog
* Not a frontend, data-engineering, or ML/Data Science career path. This person integrates and consumes AI services, they don't build data pipelines or train models as their craft


 Who are you?
   

  

 Your temperament matters as much as your stack and ambitions. You'll join a team with traits that are strikingly consistent: a curious, low-ego builder who takes real ownership of quality and reliability, communicates clearly, and is happiest making both the work and the people around them better.
   

  

 Concretely, that means someone collaborative and unterritorial — focused on lifting the team around them rather than guarding turf — and pragmatic and outcome-oriented, bridging technical work and business goals and comfortable with product and stakeholders
   

  

 Skils & Background
   

  

* 5+ years as a developer/SW engineer/programmer/cloud engineer, who enjoys building for builders
* Go (Golang) is your home turf + you have depth and feel comfortable in at least one other, modern, language like, C#, Python, Java, or Typescript
* AWS, Azure, or GCP — any one, or a combination, heck even onpremises counts
* Any infrastructure-as-code — Pulumi or Terraform are preferred
* Demonstrable interest in AI is required, hands-on experience a plus\*
* Managed or self-managed Kubernetes (Bonus, not a requirement)
* Fluency in Swedish and English, as most of our collaborations and client projects are conducted in Swedish
* Interest in AI is a requirement for this role; hands-on AI experience is a strong plus but not a prerequisite. The bar, though, is evidenced curiosity rather than a bare claim of interest — we want someone who can actually show something.


 Required: genuine, demonstrable engagement with AI tooling — a side project, real use of AI coding assistants, or a considered first-hand opinion formed from building with them.
   

  

 A strong plus: hands-on experience with AI/LLM infrastructure and frameworks — AWS Bedrock / AgentCore, Vertex AI, agentic frameworks, Claude Code, and similar.
   

  

 Let's Play!
   

  

 Applying to us is a breeze!
   

  

* Upload your resumé or use your Linkedin profile
* Answer the choice-questions (no "please-rewrite-your-resume" nonsense, promise)
* Feel free to include links to your portfolio, GitHub or similar if you have stuff you're proud of that you want to share with us


**Important Notes**
* Playground Group does not provide visa sponsorship or relocation support
* Applicants must already have a permanent and independent right to work in Sweden
* As part of the final stage of the recruitment process, a background check conducted by a third party will be carried out.


 Welcome to Playground!
   

  

 At Playground, you work on real, complex assignments for well-established and ambitious clients, not bench projects or short-lived experiments. Our teams are trusted with production systems, platforms, and data that actually matter. Here growth comes from ownership, curiosity, and doing the work properly. You’re trusted to think, contribute, and keep getting better, one meaningful step at a time.
   

  

 Playground brings together specialized domains under one umbrella, with a shared culture and way of working, and easy access to broad technical expertise when it helps move the work forward.
   

  

 Buzz: Cloud Infra Coder, SW Engineer, Developer, Programmer, Engineer, Backend, Fullstack, GO, Golang, Java, C#, .NET, Javascript, Agentic AI, Cursor, GPT, SDK, Sverige, Sweden, Stockholm, Utvecklare, Moln

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 





 At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.
 




  






 Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.
 




  






 Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers.  If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays.
 




  





**ABOUT THE ROLE** 



  


 To further empower our engineering organisation, we are looking for a product-minded Senior Platform Engineer. Our platform team's mission is clear: Empower teams to deploy and operate services quickly and safely through a self-service platform that reduces cognitive load and enforces security, reliability, and compliance by default.
 


  


  


 At this level, your biggest shift is moving from owning your personal work to owning organizational outcomes, and from following paths to creating the "paved road" for others. You will act as a true technical partner to our engineering teams, treating the platform as a product, actively shaping its vision, and driving the roadmap that enables our developers to build faster and more safely.
 


  






  




**WHAT YOU'LL DO** 
  

  
* **Architect the Paved Road:** 
 Own and evolve the product deployment chain utilized by our development teams, including CI/CD pipelines  and underlying delivery infrastructure. You will design these systems for scale, aiming for appropriate complexity ("as simple as possible, but no simpler")
  
* **Drive Ways of Working:** 
 Act as a cultural and technical driver for modern engineering practices. You will champion and implement SLO frameworks, promote trunk-based development, and build the tooling required for product teams to significantly increase their service availability
  
* **Champion Observability:** 
 Ensure monitoring, logging, and tracing are built in from the start, never as afterthoughts. You will provide the observability primitives that allow product teams to truly understand and trust their systems in production
  
* **Span Boundaries & Elevate Standards:** 
 Work closely with Infrastructure, Security, and Product teams to ensure a consistently high standard. You will embed "security and compliance by design" into the daily workflows of the entire engineering org without sacrificing velocity
  
* **Multiply your impact:** 
 Lift the skills of those around you by developing teammates, mentoring colleagues through detailed feedback, and evangelising platform capabilities across the broader engineering organization
  

  


  


  




**WHO YOU ARE** 
  

  
* **Experienced Platform Builder:** 
 You have significant senior-level experience (typically 7+ years) building, scaling, and operating developer platforms, CI/CD toolchains, and high-availability distributed systems in production
  
* **A "Platform as a Product" Thinker:** 
 You naturally view internal tooling from a customer perspective. You focus on developer outcomes and reducing cognitive load rather than over-engineering solutions for the sake of technical elegance
  
* **Operationally Driven:** 
 You have a veteran instinct for spotting systemic failure modes and identifying operational risks long before they impact availability. You deeply understand SLOs, error budgets, and how to balance reliability with feature velocity
  
* **Comfortable in Ambiguity:** 
 You do not wait for perfect clarity; you make timely decisions, define problems when they are unclear, and do not let uncertainty become paralysis
  
* **A Boundary-Spanning Collaborator:** 
 You proactively cross team boundaries to solve problems. You know how to build alignment between product developers, security experts, and infrastructure engineers, navigating difficult technical trade-offs with empathy and direct communication
  

  


  





  




  


**Our Fantastic Benefits
 
 (varies by location)
 

 🌴
 **20 to 25 days of holiday** 
 to support a healthy work-life balance
 



 🥳
 **Monthly team outing allowance** 
 to enjoy social events with your colleagues
 



 ☕
 **Office perks** 
 such as refreshments (coffee, sodas etc.), breakfast, fruit and snacks
 




 🍴
 **Meal card** 
 to
 
 enjoy
 

 a daily lunch allowance to make your workdays even more convenient
 



 💚
 **Well being support** 
 our health allowance covers gym memberships, massages, and much more to help you feel your best
 



**PLUS** 
 additional benefits designed to enhance your work-life experience!
 



  





**Shape Your Role and Make an Impact
 
 Join a dynamic environment where you can take ownership, drive change, and continuously embrace new challenges. We’re looking for dedicated and highly motivated individuals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy collaborating across different areas of the organisation.
 



 If your skills and experience align with this role, we’d love to hear from you!
 **Apply now and submit your CV in English.** 



  


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.****

title: Suomenkielinen Business Developer
description:
Miksi BrightAnalytics?
   

  

 BrightAnalytics on yksi Belgian nopeimmin kasvavista fintech-yrityksistä. SaaS-ratkaisumme avulla autamme yrityksiä automatisoimaan johdon raportoinnin. Osana Euroopan laajentumistamme etsimme motivoituneita kollegoita liittymään tiimiimme Tukholman toimistolle. Ruotsista käsin osallistut Suomen markkinoiden kasvuun. Sinulla on mahdollisuus kasvaa ja muokata yrityksen tulevaisuutta Pohjoismaissa.
   

  

 Mitä Business Developer tekee?
   

  

* Ymmärrät prospektiemme vaatimukset ja tarpeet, ja esittelet heille BrightAnalyticsin tarinan.
* Kartoitat liiketoimintamahdollisuuksia kohdennetun segmentoinnin avulla.
* Kasvatat Account Executive -tiimimme liidien määrää kohdennetuilla myyntitoimenpiteillä (outbound-myynti, social selling, messut, seminaarit).
* Etsit jatkuvasti uusia ja luovia tapoja lisätä tunnettuuttamme.
* Tämä positio on ihanteellinen ponnahduslauta menestyksekkäälle uralle B2B-myynnissä.


 Mitä tuot mukanasi myyntitiimiin?
   

  

* Sinulla on maisterin tutkinto, mieluiten kaupalliselta alalta. Aiempi työkokemus ei ole välttämätöntä.
* Suomen kielen sujuva taito on välttämätöntä alustan monimutkaisuuden vuoksi, ja englannin kielen sujuva taito on ehdoton kansainvälisessä ympäristössämme.
* Saat energiaa kommunikoinnista potentiaalisten asiakkaiden kanssa sekä liiketoimintamahdollisuuksien löytämisestä ja kehittämisestä.
* Sinulla on motivaatiota ja itsenäisyyttä, joita tässä keskeisessä roolissa vaaditaan.
* Uteliaisuutta oppia uusia asioita joka päivä.
* Tiimipelaajana olet valmis tekemään parhaasi yhteisen menestyksen eteen.
* Viihdyt nopeasti kehittyvässä ympäristössä.
* Vahva kiinnostus liiketoimintaa, rahoitusta ja uusia teknologioita kohtaan.


 Mitä etuja tämä fintech-scale-up tarjoaa?
   

  

* Pääset osaksi kunnianhimoista, dynaamista ja innostunutta tiimiä monipuolisessa työssä.
* Viikoittaiset sisäiset koulutukset ja työssäoppiminen (coaching) opettavat sinulle ainutlaatuisia taitoja, jotka palvelevat sinua koko urasi ajan.
* Olemme taloudellisesti vakaa scale-up-yritys, jolla on kansainvälisiä kasvutavoitteita.
* Meillä on avoin yrityskulttuuri, jossa on tilaa omalle aloitteellisuudelle.
* Saat kilpailukykyisen palkan ja motivoivan bonusjärjestelmän.
* Liikunta- ja kulttuurietu (Friskvårdsbidrag).
* Eläkesuunnitelma.
* Vakuutukset (sairaus, eläke, TGL, TFA).
* Perjantain after-workit, legendaariset tiimi-illat ja vuosittainen viikonloppumatka koko BrightAnalyticsin tiimin kanssa.


**Oletko valmis kiihdyttämään uraasi fintech-alalla?** 
**Hae tänään ja kasva BrightAnalyticsin mukana!**
